name: @seojeom/mcp-server
description: Seojeom MCP server for local project wiki and graph workflows
notes: Standalone stdio mode defaults wiki tools to local filesystem authority under the selected project root.
Standalone graph read tools can opt into local snapshot authority, and graph propose/list/decision tools can use a local proposal queue.
Standalone graph context bundling can assemble prompt-ready local graph facts around a focus node from the local snapshot.
Standalone graph gap analysis can inspect local snapshot structure without upstream API calls or embedded LLM workflows.
Standalone graph workflow preparation can combine local context, local gaps, and preferred next-tool recommendations for Claude/Codex.
Standalone graph workflow preparation can also surface related local wiki pages and recommend seojeom_write_wiki when graph entities are undocumented.
Standalone graph research preparation can choose between local wiki reuse, local wiki creation, and external search query prep without running provider-bound web search.
Standalone graph runbook preparation can turn local review, local documentation, external research prep, and graph edits into one ordered tool-by-tool session plan.
Standalone graph session preparation can emit a Claude-ready local-first prompt contract with grounding rules, operator brief, and ordered tool calls.
Standalone focused graph sessions can reduce that contract to wiki documentation, packet repair, or relation fill-in steps for lower-turn Claude workflows.
Standalone graph playbooks can wrap focused sessions into named presets with phased steps, approval checkpoints, and handoff prompts for Claude operators.
Standalone graph playbook catalog can tell Claude which preset to choose first and emit a starter prompt before any graph editing call.
Standalone Claude onboarding helper can emit the exact claude mcp add command and the first MCP calls to make after install.
Standalone local graph apply supports the create_node and create_edge proposal kinds against the local canonical snapshot.
Standalone local graph scene tools operate on .seojeom/graph/scenes.json when graphAuthority=local-snapshot.
Standalone direct graph mutation supports local node/edge create-update-delete, local packet create-update, and patch_node_timeline against the local canonical snapshot.
